About Me

Full Stack Web Developer

I'm a passionate Full Stack Web Developer focused on building modern, fast, and user-friendly web experiences. I specialize in creating scalable solutions using cutting-edge technologies.

From e-commerce platforms to booking marketplaces and AI-powered applications, I've built diverse projects that solve real-world problems. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code that delivers exceptional user experiences.

Experience Journey

2022 - Present

Senior Full Stack Developer

Tech Company

Leading development of scalable web applications, mentoring junior developers, and implementing best practices for code quality and performance.

  • Led migration to Next.js, improving performance by 40%
  • Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time by 60%
  • Mentored team of 5 junior developers
2020 - 2022

Full Stack Developer

Startup Inc.

Developed and maintained multiple web applications, collaborated with design team on UI/UX, and integrated third-party APIs.

  • Built e-commerce platform serving 10K+ users
  • Reduced API response time by 50%
  • Implemented real-time features with WebSockets
2018 - 2020

Frontend Developer

Digital Agency

Created responsive web interfaces, collaborated with clients on design requirements, and optimized website performance.

  • Delivered 20+ client projects on time
  • Achieved 95% client satisfaction rate
  • Introduced component-based architecture
2017 - 2018

Junior Developer

Web Studio

Started career building websites and learning modern web technologies. Gained experience in frontend development and basic backend.

  • Learned React and Node.js
  • Contributed to 15+ projects
  • Earned promotion within 6 months
